faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.desc: Still got a question? Our team replies on WhatsApp in under 2 minutes.

items.q: What is IPTV and how does it work?
items.a: IPTV lets you watch TV over the internet. After purchase, you receive credentials to enter into an app and instantly access all our channels.
Absolutely. We use SSL encryption and Stripe or PayPal technology to guarantee 100% secure payments.

items.q: Which channels and content are included?
items.a: You get over 66,000 international channels and an unlimited VOD library (movies and series) updated daily in 4K and Full HD quality.

items.q: Which devices can I use with ATV Corner?
items.a: Our service works on all platforms: Smart TV (Samsung, LG, Android), Amazon Fire Stick, Apple TV, smartphones, Android boxes and computers.

items.q: What happens right after I pay?
items.a: It's instant! You receive your access and a full installation guide via WhatsApp or email in less than 5 minutes.

items.q: Do you offer a satisfaction guarantee?
items.a: Yes — we offer a 7-day money-back guarantee, no questions asked. If stability or quality doesn't meet your expectations, we refund in full.

items.q: My subscription has ended, how do I renew it?
items.a: Just order the pack of your choice again on our website. Renewal applies automatically to your existing account.

items.q: Can I use the subscription on multiple devices?
items.a: The standard subscription is for one screen at a time. For simultaneous use on multiple screens, contact us for a custom offer.

items.q: What if I need help with the installation?
items.a: Our technical support is available 7/7 on WhatsApp or Live Chat. We guide you step by step until everything works perfectly on your screen.

privacy.title: Privacy policy

sections.p: ATV Corner collects only the information strictly necessary to deliver its services: name, email, WhatsApp number and payment data (handled by Stripe / PayPal — we never store card numbers).
Your data is used to activate your subscription, provide technical support and notify you about renewals. No data is sold to third parties.
We use essential cookies for the site to function and anonymous analytics cookies to improve user experience.
Under GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify and delete your data.

privacy.contact_p: For any question, write to us by email or via WhatsApp.

sections.p: By subscribing to ATV Corner, you accept these terms in full.
The standard subscription is valid for one simultaneous device. Concurrent use on multiple screens requires a multi-screen subscription.
Sharing, reselling or publicly broadcasting content accessed through ATV Corner is strictly forbidden.
Any fraudulent use leads to immediate account suspension without refund.
We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes take effect upon publication.

refund.title: Refund policy
refund.intro: Money-back guarantee — your peace of mind is our priority.

sections.p: If the service does not work as advertised within 7 days of activation, you can request a full refund, no questions asked.
Contact our support on WhatsApp with your order number, describe the issue (screenshots appreciated). The refund is processed within 3 to 5 business days via Stripe or PayPal.
Refund requests submitted after 7 days, or related to hardware incompatibility not reported to our support before purchase, cannot be honored.

about_page.meta_title: About ATV Corner — Premium streaming service in Europe
about_page.meta_desc: Discover ATV Corner: European team, premium infrastructure, 12,000+ active customers. Our mission, our story, our values.
about_page.intro: ATV Corner is an independent streaming service launched in Europe with one obsession: deliver the most stable picture, the most complete channel line-up, and human support you can reach at any time.
about_page.story_p1: Born out of frustration with unstable or opaque streaming services, ATV Corner was built by passionate fans of sport and cinema to offer a clear, professional alternative.
about_page.story_p2: Today, over 12,000 customers across 20+ countries trust us for their daily entertainment — from weekend football to evening series.

values.p: Redundant servers and dedicated bandwidth so buffering disappears, even on peak-match nights.
A real team on WhatsApp 7/7, replying in under 2 minutes — no chatbot, no queue.
No commitment, 7-day money-back guarantee, plain terms. You stay in control of your subscription.

about_page.contact_p: Our team answers everyone — individuals, businesses, resellers. Reach out by email or WhatsApp.

sections.p: The site atvcorner.com is published by ATV Corner. For any correspondence, contact us at the email address below.
Email: support@atvcorner.com — WhatsApp available 7/7 via the button on every page.
The site is hosted on Vercel Inc. infrastructure, 340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut, CA 91789, USA.
All content on atvcorner.com (text, logos, images, code) is protected by copyright. Any reproduction without prior written consent is prohibited.
ATV Corner strives to keep all information accurate but cannot be held liable for errors or omissions, nor for the consequences of their use.

cookies_page.title: Cookie policy
cookies_page.intro: This page explains how ATV Corner uses cookies and similar technologies on atvcorner.com.

sections.p: A cookie is a small text file dropped on your device by a website. It typically helps remember your preferences and improve your experience.
We use a technical cookie (NEXT_LOCALE) to remember your chosen language. This cookie is required for the site to work properly and doesn't need consent.
We measure site usage anonymously to improve content. No personal data is shared with third parties for advertising.
You can remove or block cookies at any time via your browser settings. Removing the language cookie resets automatic detection.

dmca_page.title: DMCA / Copyright
dmca_page.intro: ATV Corner respects third-party intellectual property and asks its users to do the same.

sections.p: If you believe content accessible through ATV Corner infringes your copyright, write to support@atvcorner.com with: your identity, the content concerned, proof of your rights, and your contact details.
Every compliant request is reviewed within 72 hours. Disputed content is removed pending a response from the concerned party.
Any false statement engages the civil and criminal liability of its author. We reserve the right to forward such claims to the competent authorities.
